# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:treaty_name_country_country_treaty_of_peace_amity_and_commerce_between_king_and_country = {
	trigger = {
	    any_scope_article_option = {
	    	OR = {
	    		has_type = trade_privilege
	    		has_type = foreign_investment_rights
	    	}
	    }
		first_country = {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		}
	}
	weight = {
		value = 100
	}
}

REPLACE:treaty_name_concordat_between_the_holy_see_and_country_first = {
	trigger = {
		first_country = {
			c:PAP ?= this
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			}
		}
	}
	weight = {
		value = 10000 # All treaties between the Holy See and countries are Concordats
	}
}

REPLACE:treaty_name_concordat_between_the_holy_see_and_country_second = {
	trigger = {
		second_country = {
			c:PAP ?= this
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			}
		}
	}
	weight = {
		value = 10000 # All treaties between the Holy See and countries are Concordats
	}
}
